# Global Freedom Capital

> Expert advisory for citizenship by investment (CBI) and Golden Visa residency programs, serving high-net-worth families, family offices, and U.S. immigration attorneys.

Founded by Tatiana Muntean, Global Freedom Capital provides confidential, conflict-free guidance across Caribbean CBI programs and European Golden Visa pathways. The firm is an expert advisory — not a law firm — and does not provide legal, tax, or financial advice. All program data reflects publicly available government sources as of 2026.

## Core
- [Home](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/): Investment migration advisory overview for HNW families
- [About Tatiana Muntean](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/about): Founder and lead investment migration advisor
- [Contact](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/contact): Book a private, confidential consultation
- [For Immigration Attorneys](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/for-attorneys): Strategic partnership framework for U.S. immigration attorneys

## Citizenship by Investment (Caribbean & emerging programs)
- [CBI Programs Hub](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/citizenship-by-investment): Compare all citizenship by investment programs
- [Antigua & Barbuda](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/citizenship-by-investment/antigua-barbuda): Caribbean second citizenship from $230,000, 150+ visa-free countries
- [Saint Kitts & Nevis](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/citizenship-by-investment/saint-kitts-nevis): The world's oldest CBI program (est. 1984)
- [Grenada](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/citizenship-by-investment/grenada): The only Caribbean CBI with U.S. E-2 investor treaty access
- [Dominica](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/citizenship-by-investment/dominica): Among the most affordable second citizenships, from $200,000
- [Saint Lucia](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/citizenship-by-investment/saint-lucia): Flexible options including government bonds
- [São Tomé & Príncipe](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/citizenship-by-investment/sao-tome-and-principe): Discreet fast-track citizenship from $90,000
- [Sierra Leone](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/citizenship-by-investment/sierra-leone): Go For Gold fast-track citizenship from $140,000
- [Turkey](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/citizenship-by-investment/turkey): Fast-track citizenship from $400,000 with U.S. E-2 treaty access

## Golden Visa & EU Residency by Investment
- [Golden Visa Hub](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/golden-visa): Compare EU residency by investment programs
- [Portugal](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/golden-visa/portugal): EU residency with citizenship pathway after 5 years
- [Greece](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/golden-visa/greece): Europe's most affordable Golden Visa, from €250,000
- [Hungary](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/golden-visa/hungary): Guest Investor Visa via real estate funds, from €250,000
- [Bulgaria](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/golden-visa/bulgaria): EU residency with citizenship pathway and Schengen access
- [Latvia](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/golden-visa/latvia): EU residency from €60,000, fast 2–3 month processing
- [Malta (MPRP)](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/golden-visa/malta): Lifetime EU permanent residency, Schengen access, from €150,000
- [UAE](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/golden-visa/uae): 10-year renewable Golden Visa in a tax-efficient Gulf hub
- [Panama](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/golden-visa/panama): Qualified Investor Visa — fast permanent residency in a USD economy

## Resources & Insights
- [Blog](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/resources/blog): Expert guides on investment migration
- [FAQ](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/resources/faq): Common questions on CBI & Golden Visas
- [Best CBI Programs 2026](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/resources/blog/best-citizenship-by-investment-programs-2026): Comparative analysis of leading 2026 programs
- [Golden Visa vs CBI](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/resources/blog/golden-visa-vs-citizenship-by-investment): Cost, timeline, rights, and tax comparison
- [CBI for U.S. Citizens](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/resources/blog/citizenship-by-investment-us-citizens): Tax obligations, dual citizenship, second passport options
- [Antigua vs Grenada](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/resources/blog/antigua-vs-grenada-citizenship-comparison): Side-by-side Caribbean CBI comparison
- [Insights](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/insights): Strategic analysis for HNW families
- [Real Estate](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/real-estate): Qualifying real estate for CBI & RBI programs
- [Destinations Overview](https://www.globalfreedomcapital.com/destinations): All jurisdictions advised by GFC
